content:
> **System Mapping**: This channel is perfect for your recursive, mythogenic design. Use it as your **core system-builder circuit**.

---

## 🧬 \[SECTION 01 SUMMARY\]

You have **4 defined channels**, and they form the **backbone of your energetic identity**:

| Theme | Channels Involved | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Creative Performance | 34–20 | Live, responsive, embodied output |
| Legacy Completion | 42–53 | Cycle through deep arcs, don’t quit early |
| Emotional Bonding | 59–6 | Fertile intimacy + sacred duo collabs |
| Creative Mutation | 3–60 | Chaos-aligned creation, radical system-making |

---

### ❓ HOW TO USE THIS

1. **Role Assignments**: You can cast each channel as a role in your mythic OS:
- Channeler, Builder, Bondmaker, Mutator
2. **Prompt Design**: Each channel can be its own AI prompt shell
3. **Time Block Matching**: Assign creative windows that correspond to each channel
